title: drmTMB reproduces metafor & glmmTMB meta-analysis estimates
trust_level_meaning: equivalence-to-comparator on published examples (L3 = independent replication)

criteria.S1_multilevel: metafor==glmmTMB==drmTMB, max abs diff 4.6e-05 (achieved: var comps ~7dp, effect 5dp, SE 4dp)
criteria.S4_coverage_smoke: near-nominal on 100-rep smoke; calibrated grid -> Totoro

reference: Williams et al., Meta-analysis with the glmmTMB R package, arXiv:2604.04084
Viechtbauer & Lopez-Lopez (2022), Location-scale models for meta-analysis
